records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Contraindicated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Contraindicating (?).]

defs: To indicate, as by a symptom, some method of treatment contrary to that which the general tenor of the case would seem to require; especially, to indicate that a particular method of treatment should not be used; as, penicillin is contraindicated in patients who have shown hypersensitivity.
